TH000.label: default
TH000.notes: Fallback/default visual theme. Public pages must inherit instead of rendering broken blanks.

TH001.label: christmas
TH001.notes: Seasonal visual theme placeholder. Missing role assets inherit from TH000.

TH002.notes: EMS Week visual theme placeholder. Missing role assets inherit from TH000.

TH003.notes: Nurses Week visual theme placeholder. Missing role assets inherit from TH000.

TH004.label: patriotic
TH004.notes: Patriotic visual theme placeholder. Missing role assets inherit from TH000.

TH005.label: halloween
TH005.notes: Halloween visual theme placeholder. Missing role assets inherit from TH000.
